title: genista ifniensis var. tamarruti
intro: Genista ifniensis var. tamarruti is a rare and lesser-known species of shrub, belonging to the Fabaceae family of flowering plants. It is native to the Canary Islands and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Herbal preparations of Genista ifniensis var. tamarruti include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made from the plant's leaves, stems, and flowers.
